category_sources: source_facts.description says grafanactl is a CLI to interact with Grafana; official repository describes it as a command-line tool for Grafana resources.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is grafanactl and official docs at https://grafana.github.io/grafanactl/ use Grafanactl/grafanactl.
docs_sources: Official grafanactl documentation is served from Grafana's GitHub Pages site at https://grafana.github.io/grafanactl/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/grafana/grafanactl, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official repository describe a CLI for interacting with Grafana instances and resources.
